# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx
          systemctl start nginx
          systemctl enable nginx

- name: cloudsql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: allow-all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0
      databaseFlags:
      - name: sql_mode
        value: "STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,NO_ZERO_DATE,NO_ZERO_IN_DATE,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO"

- name: storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: my-app-bucket
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    retentionPolicy:
      retentionPeriod: 0
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: 30

- name: http-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2
    requestPath: /

- name: backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    backends:
    - group: zones/us-central1-a/instanceGroups/vm-instance
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      maxUtilization: 0.8
    healthChecks:
    - https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/httpHealthChecks/http-health-check
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    portName: http
    protocol: HTTP
    timeoutSec: 30
    sessionAffinity: NONE

- name: url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/backendServices/backend-service
    hostRules:
    - hosts:
      - '*'
      pathMatcher: all-paths
    pathMatchers:
    - name: all-paths
      defaultService: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/backendServices/backend-service

- name: target-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/urlMaps/url-map

- name: forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    name: http-forwarding-rule
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/targetHttpProxies/target-http-proxy
